name: Ipswich Lemon Pie (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 400°F or Mark 6.
2. Line a 7 inch flan dish with the pastry.
3. In a saucepan, combine grated lemon rind, lemon juice, butter, and sugar. Heat gently until the sugar has completely dissolved, stirring as little as possible.
4. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
5. Strain the beaten eggs into the cooled mixture and stir gently until combined.
6. Pour the mixture into the pastry case.
7. Brush the edges of the pie with milk to glaze.
8. Cook for 10 minutes at 400°F or Mark 6, then reduce the oven temperature to 350°F or Mark 4.
9. Continue cooking for a further 15 to 20 minutes until the filling is set and the pastry is lightly golden.
10. Serve hot or cold with cream.
